stamp.title: US 5c Franklin Essay
stamp.summary: US 5c Benjamin Franklin design in blue. Likely an essay or trial color proof related to the 1847 issue design.

stamp.title: 3c Washington Essay, Gibson Patent
stamp.summary: US 3c Washington essay by National Bank Note Co. on Abram Gibson Patent paper. Black ink, imperforate. Part of Scott 79-E25 group.
